author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Revised approach: PyTorch's bmm backward simply calls bmm(grad_C, B.transpose(1,2)) and bmm(A.transpose(1,2), grad_C). Do the same — write a batch_transpose helper for 3D tensors, then call the existing GPU-aware bmm in the backward under no_grad. Forward also just calls the existing GPU-aware bmm and attaches BmmBackward.
